attributes.name: id
attributes.description:
Unique identifier for the SCIM resource as defined by the Service Provider. Each representation of the
                resource MUST include a non-empty id value. This identifier MUST be unique across the Service Provider's
                entire set of resources. It MUST be a stable, non-reassignable identifier that does not change when the
                same resource is returned in subsequent requests. The value of the id attribute is always issued by the
                Service Provider and MUST never be specified by the Service Consumer. REQUIRED.

attributes.name: userName
attributes.description:
Unique identifier for the User, typically used by the user to directly authenticate to the service
                provider. Each User MUST include a non-empty userName value. This identifier MUST be unique across the
                service provider's entire set of Users.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description:
The components of the user's real name. Providers MAY return just the full name as a single string in
                the formatted sub-attribute, or they MAY return just the individual component attributes using the other
                sub-attributes, or they MAY return both.  If both variants are returned, they SHOULD be describing the
                same name, with the formatted name indicating how the component attributes should be combined.

subAttributes.name: formatted
subAttributes.description:
The full name, including all middle names, titles, and suffixes as appropriate,
                        formatted for display (e.g., 'Ryan Buccellato').

subAttributes.name: familyName
subAttributes.description:
The family name of the User, or last name in most Western languages (e.g., 'Buccellato' given
                        the full name 'Ryan Buccellato').

subAttributes.name: givenName
subAttributes.description:
The given name of the User, or first name in most Western languages (e.g., 'Ryan' given the full
                        name 'Ryan Buccellato').

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: A Boolean value indicating the User's active status.

attributes.name: emails
attributes.description:
Email addresses for the user. The value SHOULD be canonicalized by the service provider,
                e.g., 'pat@example.com' instead of 'pat@EXAMPLE.COM'.

subAttributes.name: value
subAttributes.description:
Email addresses for the user. The value SHOULD be canonicalized by the service provider, e.g.,
                        'pat@example.com' instead of 'pat@EXAMPLE.COM'.

subAttributes.name: primary
subAttributes.description:
A Boolean value indicating the 'primary' or preferred attribute value for this attribute, e.g.,
                        the preferred mailing address or primary email address.  The primary attribute value 'true' MUST
                        appear no more than once.

attributes.name: groups
attributes.description:
A list of groups to which the user belongs, either through direct membership, through nested groups, or
                dynamically calculated.

subAttributes.name: value
subAttributes.description: The identifier of the User's group.

subAttributes.name: $ref
subAttributes.description: The URI of the corresponding 'Group' resource to which the user belongs.

subAttributes.name: display
subAttributes.description: A human-readable name, primarily used for display purposes.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description:
Unique identifier for the SCIM resource as defined by the Service Provider. Each representation of the
                resource MUST include a non-empty id value. This identifier MUST be unique across the Service Provider's
                entire set of resources. It MUST be a stable, non-reassignable identifier that does not change when the
                same resource is returned in subsequent requests. The value of the id attribute is always issued by the
                Service Provider and MUST never be specified by the Service Consumer. REQUIRED.

attributes.name: displayName
attributes.description: A human-readable name for the Group.

attributes.name: members
attributes.description: A list of members of the Group.

subAttributes.name: value
subAttributes.description: Identifier of the member of this Group.

subAttributes.name: $ref
subAttributes.description: The URI corresponding to a SCIM resource that is a member of this Group.
